landing.heroSubtitle: From registration to results — on one platform.
landing.ctaMicro: Free to start · No credit card required
landing.feat1Desc: Generate a full day schedule in seconds — teams, pitches, times.
landing.feat2Desc: Standings update automatically. Participants see results instantly.
landing.feat3Desc: Participants follow the tournament on their phone — no extra apps needed.
landing.step1Desc: Name, date, format — ready in minutes.
landing.step2Desc: Manually or via a public registration form — your choice.
landing.step3Desc: Enter results, standings update, everyone sees the table in real time.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Registration is free. No credit card required.
landing.metaDesc: Organise a sports tournament in minutes. Automatic schedule, real-time standings, team registration. Free for all sports organisers.
landing.howOrganizeTitle: How to organise a tournament with Fixturday?
landing.orgStep1Desc: Sign up to Fixturday and create your first tournament — add a name, dates, and description. Takes less than two minutes.
landing.orgStep2Desc: Add teams manually or open public registration — teams apply themselves and you approve their entry.
landing.orgStep3Desc: Choose a format — round robin, knockout, or group stage with playoff. Set available pitches and game duration. The schedule is generated automatically.
landing.orgStep4Desc: Enter results after each game. Standings update in real time. Participants can follow results on their phone — no registration needed.
landing.whyDesc: Sports organisers have traditionally used Excel spreadsheets or WhatsApp groups to run tournaments. Fixturday replaces this with an automated solution that saves hours of work and delivers a professional experience for all participants.
landing.whyBenefit1: Automatic schedule in seconds, not hours
landing.whyBenefit2: Standings update automatically — no manual calculations
landing.whyBenefit3: Participants follow results in real time on their phone
landing.whyBenefit4: Public page for every tournament at no extra cost
landing.sport1Desc: Every team plays every other team once. Perfect for league championships where the best team over all rounds wins. Standings are calculated live after each result.
landing.sport2Desc: Single-elimination bracket — one loss and you're out. Fixturday auto-generates the draw, seeds teams by registration order, and updates the bracket live.
landing.sport3Desc: Teams play round-robin in groups, then group toppers advance to a knockout bracket. Ideal for large tournaments with many teams and limited time.

about.title: About Fixturday
about.subtitle: Learn more about the platform and its creators.
about.mission: Fixturday is built for the sports community — so that organising a tournament is as simple as taking part in one.
about.value1Desc: From idea to schedule in minutes.
about.metaDesc: Fixturday is built for the sports community. Learn more about the platform and its developer.

contact.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters.
contact.successBody: We will reply to your email shortly.
contact.metaDesc: Contact the Fixturday team. Email: mail@endelis.co

guide.pageTitle: How to Organise a Sports Tournament — Guide | Fixturday
guide.metaDesc: Complete guide to organising a sports tournament with Fixturday. From registration to match day — step by step.
guide.heroTitle: How to organise a sports tournament
guide.heroSubtitle: Complete guide from registration to results. Time: ~10 minutes. Cost: free.
guide.s1Body: Start by creating a free account at fixturday.com/admin/register. Enter your name, email, and password. Registration takes less than a minute.
guide.s1Tip: Tip: Use a work email to make it easier to share with colleagues or co-organisers.
guide.mockLoginLink: Already have an account? Log in
guide.s2Body: After registration, go to the admin panel and click '+ New tournament'. Fill in the following fields:
guide.s2f2Desc: Public URL — auto-generated from the name, editable before publishing
guide.s2f3Desc: When the tournament takes place — start and end date
guide.s2f4Desc: Tournament rules shown on the public page (optional)
guide.s2f5Desc: What participants see on the public tournament page
guide.s2f6Desc: Email and phone — visible to participants
guide.s2Tip: The slug (URL address) is generated automatically from the name. For example: city-cup-2026. It can be changed before publishing.
guide.s3Body: Divisions let you run multiple categories within one tournament — for example U10, U12, U14 or Women and Men. Each division has its own format, schedule, and standings. Set: division name, tournament format, maximum team count, and game duration in minutes.
guide.s4Body: Add the venue and number of pitches. The automatic scheduler uses this information to avoid pitch clashes and ensure two games never run at the same time on the same pitch.
guide.s4Tip: If the tournament is held in one sports hall with 2 pitches, add a venue 'Sports Hall' and two pitches: 'Pitch A' and 'Pitch B'. The generator will automatically split games between both pitches.
guide.s5MethodADesc: Add teams yourself by entering name, contact person, and email. Suitable when the organiser already knows all teams.
guide.s5MethodBDesc: Open registration — teams apply through the public tournament page. You approve or reject applications from the admin panel.
guide.s5Tip: Set the registration deadline at least 3 days before the tournament to prepare the schedule and send information to teams in time.
guide.s6Intro: The automatic schedule generator creates a full day schedule, taking into account:
guide.s6f5: Minimum rest time between a team's games
guide.s6Warning: Generate the schedule only after all teams are confirmed. If the team count changes, the schedule must be regenerated — the previous one will be deleted.
guide.s7Body: On match day, use the Matchday board to enter scores and log match events. Standings update automatically for every participant after each saved result.
guide.s7step1: Open the admin panel on your phone
guide.s7step2: Go to 'Matchday' from the tournament sidebar
guide.s7step3: Type the score into the number fields and press Save — or log individual goals and cards using the Events panel below each fixture
guide.s7step4: Standings update automatically for everyone following the public page
guide.s7Tip: Participants can follow results in real time on their phone through the public page. No registration or app required.
guide.s8Body: Every tournament has a unique public page. Share this link with all participants, parents, and spectators:
guide.s8f4: Register a team (if registration is open)
guide.s8Tip: Share the tournament link via WhatsApp or email — participants can save it and follow the tournament from their phones without downloading an app.
guide.faq1Q: How long does it take to create a tournament?
guide.faq1A: A basic tournament takes about 10 minutes to set up. Schedule generation happens in seconds once all teams are confirmed.
guide.faq2A: There is no strict limit. The platform supports tournaments from 4 to 32 and more teams. For large tournaments, the group + playoff format is recommended.
guide.faq3Q: Can I organise a multi-day tournament?
guide.faq3A: Yes, enter a start and end date when creating the tournament. The schedule can be split across days, and the system accounts for each day's time constraints.
guide.faq4Q: What if a result was entered incorrectly?
guide.faq4A: Results can be edited at any time in the Results section. Standings update automatically after the correction.
guide.faq5A: Yes, Fixturday is fully available in English and Latvian. More languages coming soon.

legal.dataDeletionIntro: Under GDPR you have the right to request deletion of your personal data from the Fixturday platform. Fill in the form below — we will process your request within 30 days.
legal.dataDeletionWhatDeletedBody: your account information, created tournaments, and associated data. Publicly available tournament results may be retained in anonymised form for historical purposes.
legal.dataDeletionSubmittedDetail: We will contact you within 30 days at the email address provided.
legal.dataDeletionDescPlaceholder: Please describe what data you want deleted (e.g. all account information, a specific tournament, team data, etc.)
legal.dataDeletionConsentText: By submitting this form, you consent to your email address being processed for the purpose of fulfilling this request in accordance with our
